description: Implement Router.swap() per FR-1/3/4/5/6/7/8/9/10/12/15/16/17 using the Behavior Specification's happy-path sequence and the Error Handling table. Pulls input via SafeERC20.transferFrom (or msg.value for NATIVE_ETH_SENTINEL), measures actual pulled via balance-diff, deducts protocolFeeAmount = pulled*protocolFeeBps/10000, optionally deducts input-denominated partner fee and pays partnerRecipient, forwards remaining input to executor (ERC20: SafeERC20.safeTransfer to executor; native: forward via .call{value:forwardAmount}(abi.encodeCall(IExecutor.executePath,(commands,state)))), snapshots outputToken balance before/after, applies positive-slippage cap at outputQuote unless passPositiveSlippageToUser is true, optionally deducts output-denominated partner fee, enforces outputMin, transfers to recipient (SafeERC20 or .call{value}), emits Swap(...). Also implement swapRouterFunds(SwapParams) as an onlyOwnerOrLiquidator variant that performs the same swap path starting from Router-held funds (no transferFrom, no msg.value) -- used to convert accumulated fee dust.
commit: feat(router): implement swap() with fees, balance-diff, and slippage
steps: Add internal helper `_validateSwap(SwapParams memory p)` that reverts with the correct named error for each condition in the spec's Error Handling table: ZeroInputAmount, ZeroOutputQuote, ZeroOutputMin, InvalidSlippageBounds (outputMin > outputQuote), SelfSwap, ProtocolFeeExceedsCap, PartnerFeeExceedsCap, InvalidPartnerRecipient (partnerFeeBps > 0 && partnerRecipient == address(0)), ETHValueMismatch (inputToken == NATIVE_ETH_SENTINEL && msg.value != inputAmount) OR (inputToken != NATIVE_ETH_SENTINEL && msg.value != 0). Revert ExecutorNotSet if executor == address(0).

Add internal helper `_balanceOf(address token) internal view returns (uint256)` that returns address(this).balance when token == NATIVE_ETH_SENTINEL else IERC20(token).balanceOf(address(this)). Add `_pullInput(address token, uint256 amount) internal returns (uint256 pulled)` that returns amount for NATIVE_ETH_SENTINEL (already held via msg.value) else does `uint256 before = IERC20(token).balanceOf(address(this)); IERC20(token).safeTransferFrom(msg.sender, address(this), amount); return IERC20(token).balanceOf(address(this)) - before;` (handles fee-on-transfer per FR-15).

Add internal `_transferOut(address token, address to, uint256 amount) internal` that no-ops on zero amount; for NATIVE_ETH_SENTINEL uses `(bool ok,) = to.call{value:amount}(""); if (!ok) revert ETHTransferFailed();`; else SafeERC20.safeTransfer.

Add internal `_forwardToExecutor(address token, uint256 amount, bytes32[] memory commands, bytes[] memory state) internal` that for ERC20 safeTransfers amount to executor then calls `IExecutor(executor).executePath(commands, state);` (no value), and for NATIVE_ETH_SENTINEL calls `(bool ok,) = executor.call{value:amount}(abi.encodeCall(IExecutor.executePath,(commands,state))); if (!ok) assembly { returndatacopy(0,0,returndatasize()) revert(0,returndatasize()) }` so underlying reverts bubble.

Replace `revert NotImplemented();` in swap() with the following sequence: (a) _validateSwap(params); (b) uint256 pulled = _pullInput(params.inputToken, params.inputAmount); (c) uint256 protocolFee = (pulled * params.protocolFeeBps) / 10000; (d) uint256 inputPartnerFee = params.partnerFeeOnOutput ? 0 : (pulled * params.partnerFeeBps) / 10000; if >0 _transferOut(params.inputToken, params.partnerRecipient, inputPartnerFee); (e) uint256 forwardAmount = pulled - protocolFee - inputPartnerFee; (f) uint256 outputBefore = _balanceOf(params.outputToken); (g) _forwardToExecutor(params.inputToken, forwardAmount, params.weirollCommands, params.weirollState); (h) uint256 amountOut = _balanceOf(params.outputToken) - outputBefore; (i) uint256 positiveSlippage = 0; if (!params.passPositiveSlippageToUser && amountOut > params.outputQuote) { positiveSlippage = amountOut - params.outputQuote; amountOut = params.outputQuote; } (j) uint256 outputPartnerFee = 0; if (params.partnerFeeOnOutput && params.partnerFeeBps > 0) { outputPartnerFee = (amountOut * params.partnerFeeBps) / 10000; amountOut -= outputPartnerFee; _transferOut(params.outputToken, params.partnerRecipient, outputPartnerFee); } (k) if (amountOut < params.outputMin) revert SlippageExceeded(params.outputToken, amountOut, params.outputMin); (l) _transferOut(params.outputToken, params.recipient, amountOut); (m) emit Swap(msg.sender, params.inputToken, params.inputAmount, params.outputToken, amountOut + outputPartnerFee + positiveSlippage, amountOut, protocolFee, inputPartnerFee + outputPartnerFee, positiveSlippage, params.partnerRecipient); return amountOut;

Implement swapRouterFunds(SwapParams calldata params) as: validate as a normal swap except skip input-amount/msg.value pulling (Router already holds funds); set `pulled = params.inputAmount` and `require(_balanceOf(params.inputToken) >= pulled)` before running steps (c)..(m) above; recipient is constrained to be non-zero and the amountOut ends up in that recipient (may be Router itself). Gate with onlyOwnerOrLiquidator. Emit Swap as usual.
Run `forge build`. Only the scaffold tests from prior tasks may exist; this step focuses on compile.
acceptance_criteria: [auto] `forge build` compiles src/Router.sol with zero errors.
[auto] grep -n 'function swap(SwapParams calldata params) external payable' src/Router.sol matches exactly one line.
[auto] grep -n 'revert NotImplemented' src/Router.sol matches at most one line (only swapMulti() until INF-0006).

[auto] grep -n 'safeTransferFrom\|balanceOf(address(this))\|balanceOf(address\s*\(\s*this\s*\))' src/Router.sol shows balance-diff usage (>=2 matches covering transferFrom and before/after snapshots).
[auto] grep -n 'IExecutor(executor).executePath\|executor.call{value' src/Router.sol matches at least two lines (ERC20 path + native-ETH path).
[auto] grep -n 'emit Swap(' src/Router.sol matches at least one line in swap() body.
[auto] grep -n 'revert SlippageExceeded' src/Router.sol matches at least one line; grep shows it is compared against outputMin after all fee deductions.
[auto] grep -n 'onlyOwnerOrLiquidator' src/Router.sol is applied to swapRouterFunds and transferRouterFunds (at least 2 uses).
[auto] `forge inspect Router methodIdentifiers` lists swap((...)) and swapRouterFunds((...)).
[manual] Behavior Spec step ordering is preserved verbatim: validate -> pull -> protocolFee -> inputPartnerFee -> forward -> measure -> cap -> outputPartnerFee -> outputMin check -> transfer -> emit.

[manual] Event params reconstruct fee attribution: amountOut sum in event equals pulled-forward side (inputs) equaling the output side post-slippage + partner + positive-slippage (invariant used by INF-0012).
[manual] Native-ETH input call forwards value to executor and bubbles executor reverts verbatim (no silent catch).
implementation_notes: Implemented swap() and swapRouterFunds() per the Behavior Specification. Added internal helpers: _validateSwapCommon/_validateSwap (Error Handling table), _balanceOf, _pullInput (FR-15 balance-diff), _transferOut (ERC20 + native with ETHTransferFailed), _forwardToExecutor (ERC20 safeTransfer+call; native call{value} with assembly returndata bubble), _executeSwap (steps c..m), and _emitSwap (extracted to avoid stack-too-deep). Event 'amountOut' field reconstructs executor output as amountToUser+outputPartnerFee+positiveSlippage (invariant for INF-0012). swapRouterFunds skips msg.value/transferFrom, requires Router already holds input, and is gated onlyOwnerOrLiquidator. All 9 auto acceptance criteria verified (build, greps, methodIdentifiers); forge test suite (15 tests) passes. Commit 4b4026e.
